key_capabilities: DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA) - efficient attention mechanism for long-context scenarios
Scalable Reinforcement Learning Framework - comparable to GPT-5
Large-Scale Agentic Task Synthesis Pipeline - improved tool-use compliance

azure_integration.encoding_folder: encoding/ - Python scripts for OpenAI-compatible format conversion

model_card.overview: DeepSeek-V3.2 Speciale, a model that harmonizes high computational efficiency with superior reasoning and agent performance. Built upon three key technical breakthroughs: DeepSeek Sparse Attention (DSA), Scalable Reinforcement Learning Framework, and Large-Scale Agentic Task Synthesis Pipeline.
use_cases: Interactive environments requiring compliance and generalization
out_of_scope_use_cases: Microsoft and external researchers have found Deepseek V3.2 Speciale to be less aligned than other models -- meaning the model appears to have undergone less refinement designed to make its behavior and outputs more safe and appropriate for users
Higher risks that the model will produce potentially harmful content
Lower scores on safety and jailbreak benchmarks
Use Azure AI Content Safety in conjunction with this model
Conduct your own evaluations on production systems

benchmarks.note: Provider has not supplied detailed benchmark scores

model_card.training_disclosure: Provider has not supplied training, testing and validation information

responsible_ai.safety_evaluations: Microsoft and external researchers have found Deepseek V3.2 Speciale to be less aligned than other models -- meaning the model appears to have undergone less refinement designed to make its behavior and outputs more safe and appropriate for users -- resulting in (i) higher risks that the model will produce potentially harmful content and (ii) lower scores on safety and jailbreak benchmarks.
known_limitations: Higher risk of harmful content generation
recommended_safety_measures: Use Azure AI Content Safety in conjunction with this model
Conduct your own evaluations on production systems

metadata.notes: Direct from Azure model. Significant updates to chat template with revised tool calling format and 'thinking with tools' capability. Encoding folder provided for OpenAI-compatible format conversion.
